text: Nutrition: PM POSHAN (Mid-Day Meal). Budget: ₹11,600 crore FY24. Cooked meals for 11.8 crore children in 11.2 lakh government schools (Classes I-VIII). One of world's largest school feeding programmes. Improved attendance and learning outcomes.

Nutrition: ICDS/Saksham Anganwadi. ₹20,263 crore. 13.9 lakh Anganwadi Centres. Supplementary nutrition for 10 crore children (0-6 years) and 2.5 crore pregnant/lactating women. Pre-school education, immunization, health check-ups.

Nutrition: POSHAN Abhiyaan. ₹3,700 crore. Target: 2% annual reduction in stunting, underweight, anemia. Jan Andolan approach. POSHAN Tracker app monitors 10 crore beneficiaries. Real-time data for targeted interventions.

Nutrition/Food: National Food Security Act 2013. 81.35 crore beneficiaries. Free 5 kg foodgrains/person/month under PMGKAY (extended). PDS through 5.5 lakh Fair Price Shops. Aadhaar-linked One Nation One Ration Card for portability.
